text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Arrrgh! Seriously, WHAT DA HELL! I<n>can't take it
anymore!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
What is Brian's DEAL? If she's gonna eat<n>so much,
the cafeteria needs to start<n>limitin' people!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
And please! Somebody stop Rudolf and<n>her
crimes against comedy!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... But no one else is makin'wise cracks... Am I the weird one?
